experience.title: Web Developer - HuguR
experience.description: Worked on a research project in conjunction with the psychology department developing a website that worked to enable students to take psychology courses in a digital format. Was responsible for designing and developing the frontend.  Made an in-depth user requirement analysis, detailed prototype and worked closely with psychologists and users to ensure requirements were being met

projects.title: Book Club Social Platform (ReadTogether)
projects.description: A social book platform where users can search for books, save favourites into custom reading lists, and share those lists with friends. It has a modern web app on the front end, built with Next.js and React, and a .NET-based backend API that handles users, authentication, and core app features. The platform stores data in PostgreSQL and connects to Google Books to power book search and discovery.

projects.title: Lyric Guessing Game (GuessTheLyric)
projects.description: Guess the Lyric is a music trivia web app that challenges players to identify songs from lyric snippets, with a Daily mode that gives everyone the same song each day and an Infinite mode for unlimited rounds. It uses Next.js, React, and TypeScript to deliver a responsive frontend experience, while Prisma and PostgreSQL power the backend data layer for songs, artists, and generated game sessions, making it a polished project that combines engaging gameplay with real-world full-stack architecture.
